name: Orange-Chocolate Chippers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Cream together shortening and cream cheese until smooth.
3. Add sugar, eggs, orange peel, and vanilla; beat well.
4. Stir in baking powder and salt.
5. Fold in flour until combined.
6. Stir in chocolate chips and nuts (if using).
7. Drop spoonfuls of dough about 2 inches apart onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
9. Allow to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring to a wire rack.
